_snapshot_meta.reason: F-005 workaround: labelwatch discovery pipeline did not ingest moderation.bsky.app service record into labelwatch.db/discovery_events. Snapshot captured via direct appview probe so deriver can resolve emitter_declared provenance for declared labels. Does NOT fix the underlying ingestion gap.
_snapshot_meta.discipline_note: This snapshot is an emitter declaration. consumer_scope=emitter_declared, NEVER global_platform. Labels declared here that are also in upstream_const remain global_platform via the upstream path; labels declared here but absent from upstream_const are emitter_declared (mod.bsky default subscription does NOT promote them to global without separate consumer evidence — opt_in_consumer_observed is deferred).
